lessons.name: 11.2 Jesus is the Good Shepherd
lessons.bigIdea: Jesus is the good shepherd, so we should listen to His voice and follow Him.
lessons.keyVerse: “I am the good shepherd. I know my sheep, and my sheep know me.” John 10:14 (NIrV)

lessons.name: 12.1 Wisdom in Times of Trouble
lessons.bigIdea: God calls us to seek Him for wisdom in times of trouble.
lessons.keyVerse: “ If any of you needs wisdom, you should ask God for it. He will give it to you.” James 1:5 (NIrV)

lessons.name: 12.2 Listen and Do What is Right
lessons.bigIdea: God call s us to listen to His word and do what it tells us.
lessons.keyVerse: “ Don’t just listen to the word. You fool yoursel ves if you do that. You must do what it says.” James 1:22 (NIrV)

lessons.name: 12.3 Treat Everyone the Same
lessons.bigIdea: God calls us to love and treat everyone the same.
lessons.keyVerse: “ My brothers and sisters, you are believers in our glorious Lord Jesus Christ. So tre at everyone the same.” James 2:1 (NIrV)

lessons.name: 12.4 Taming the Tongue
lessons.bigIdea: God calls us to honor Him by being careful with our words.
lessons.keyVerse: “ The tongue is a small part of a person’s body. But it talks big. Think about how a small spark can set a big forest on fire. ” James 3:5 (NIrV)

lessons.name: 12.5 Pray for Each Other
lessons.bigIdea: God calls us to share our struggles with one another and to pray for each other.
lessons.keyVerse: “ So confess your sins to one another . Pray for one another so that you might be healed. ” James 5:16a (NIrV)
